column5: One of the queens of American cinema. I love her approach to portraying the beauty of rural America: in particular, her long takes are a definite visual inspiration on my own work. That's how I see the world too. Even outside of that, she's a damn good humanistic writer and knows how to create a cozy ass story, whether it be nice and lowkey or absolutely heart-wrenching! One of my favorite American filmmakers for sure.
